story.text: An economy governs the mesh: contribution accrues wealth; wealth is policed into policy/privilege (policy policed by wealth of contribution); anything spending or gaining disproportionate value is INSPECTED (the loop's anti-money-laundering). It wires on folds that already exist — impact.py (value/wealth by settling; it refuses mercury = fake value) and energy.py (cost/spend, strain) — NOT a new currency; 'disproportionate' is an anomaly over impact (gain) and energy (spend). Value: leverage and waste both become visible and inspectable, and large flows get a second look by construction.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'landing-throughput' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.landing-throughput-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
